sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: US civil rights agency sues Coca-Cola distributor for excluding men from casino work trip
feed.summary: The U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) is suing Coca-Cola Beverages Northeast for alleged sex discrimination, claiming the company excluded male employees from a women's networking event at a casino resort. The lawsuit challenges diversity programming, an area the EEOC has recently targeted, and seeks monetary compensation for men who were excluded. Coca-Cola Northeast expressed disappointment in the EEOC's investigation process and stated they look forward to being vindicated in court.

feed.title: Submarine communications systems to be supplied for U.S. Navy submarines by L3Harris
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies has secured a full-rate production contract from General Dynamics Electric Boat to provide 26 shipsets of submarine communications systems for the U.S. Navy's Virginia- and Columbia-class submarines. This follow-on award covers production through 2033 and includes potential support for future Columbia-class platforms and allied navies. The systems aim to enhance crew communication and situational awareness while maintaining low observability for submarine operations.

feed.title: GE United Engine Deal Deepens Growth Story For Aerospace Revenues
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Bailey Pemberton
feed.summary: GE Aerospace has secured a significant deal with United Airlines to supply 300 GEnx engines for its Boeing 787 Dreamliner fleet, making United the largest global GEnx operator. This agreement not only strengthens the existing relationship between the companies but also underscores GE's strong performance, with its stock up 57.5% over the past year. The deal is expected to contribute to GE Aerospace's long-term revenue, particularly through recurring maintenance and services, reinforcing the company's focus on cash flow and expanding its installed engine base.

feed.title: UBS lowers Moody’s stock price target to $490 on valuation concerns By Investing.com
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Moody's Corp (NYSE:MCO) shares to $490 from $515, while maintaining a Neutral rating, citing valuation concerns despite a solid performance and positive outlook. The firm acknowledges Moody's as a high-quality franchise with a good growth trajectory, particularly in its core ratings business, and notes its resilience against AI disruption. However, UBS believes the stock trades at a significant premium, suggesting better risk/reward opportunities exist elsewhere in the sector.

feed.title: JPMorgan’s in-house insurer keeps its A grade from AM Best
feed.summary: AM Best has reaffirmed its Financial Strength Rating of A (Excellent) and Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of "a" (Excellent) for Park Assurance Company, JPMorgan Chase's captive insurer. The ratings reflect Park's very strong balance sheet, strong operating performance, and integral role within JPMorgan Chase, despite a limited business profile due to product concentration and reliance on reinsurance and the Terrorism Risk Insurance Program Reauthorization Act. Park provides critical global property coverages to JPMorgan Chase, benefiting from the parent company’s significant financial and professional resources.

feed.title: Barclays Raises Price Target for ADM to $68.00 | ADM Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) to $68.00 from $61.00, while maintaining an "Equal-Weight" rating. This decision follows previous adjustments from other analysts, including JP Morgan and Morgan Stanley, with the average target price from 10 analysts now standing at $60.87, implying a potential downside. Archer-Daniels-Midland is a major processor of agricultural commodities and also has a significant nutrition business.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on National Energy Services Reunited to $31 From $25, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for National Energy Services Reunited Corp. (NESR) to $31 from $25, while reiterating its "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after the company reported its Q4 2025 earnings, which showed an increase in adjusted earnings and revenue. NESR is an oilfield service provider operating primarily in the Middle East, North Africa, and Asia Pacific regions.

feed.title: AbbVie Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.73 per share, payable on May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record on April 15, 2026. Since its inception in 2013, the company has increased its dividend by over 330 percent and is part of the S&P Dividend Aristocrats Index. AbbVie focuses on developing innovative medicines and solutions across immunology, neuroscience, oncology, and aesthetics.

feed.title: PPG, PPG Foundation invested $18.1 million in communities worldwide in 2025
feed.summary: PPG and the PPG Foundation invested $18.1 million in global communities in 2025, supporting over 400 partners across 30 countries. Their efforts focused on advancing STEM education, promoting community sustainability, and encouraging employee volunteerism, marked by the 10-year celebration of the Colorful Communities program. Key initiatives included establishing new labs, empowering young women in tech, and supporting disaster relief, demonstrating a continued commitment to creating meaningful societal impact.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser updates log haul routes near Hudson Bay area roads
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Timberlands Hudson Bay announced increased industrial traffic in the Pasquia Porcupine Forest due to logging operations, effective February 18. Motorists are advised to be cautious of log trucks and slow-moving equipment on various highways and forest roads. Log trucks will adhere to a maximum speed of 90 km/h on provincial highways, with specific routes and a detour bridge mentioned where increased traffic is expected.

feed.title: The J.M. Smucker Co. to Make Uncrustables ‘Fridge Friendly’
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. announced it is making its Uncrustables product line "fridge friendly" to eliminate thaw time, increasing convenience for consumers. This change allows the sandwiches to be stored in the refrigerator for up to five days or kept frozen, providing immediate enjoyment. The company also launched two new protein-rich morning flavors in late 2025.

feed.title: L3Harris to deliver communications systems for US Navy submarines
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies secured a full-rate production contract from General Dynamics Electric Boat to supply 26 communications shipsets for Virginia- and Columbia-class submarines. This marks L3Harris's largest order of its kind, with the systems designed to enhance situational awareness and secure communication for submarine crews. The agreement extends to 2033 and includes support for future Columbia-class submarines and allied navies.

feed.title: AbbVie Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.73 a Share, Payable May 15 to Shareholders of Record on April 15
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.73 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of April 15, 2026. This news was published on February 19, 2026, at 11:33 am EST.

feed.title: EOG Resources (EOG) 'buy' rating maintained, $150 price target
feed.summary: This article states that EOG Resources (EOG) has had its 'buy' rating maintained with a price target of $150. No further details are provided in the current content.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Price Target on Verisk Analytics to $230 From $250, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has revised its price target for Verisk Analytics (VRSK) from $250 to $230, while continuing to maintain an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst recent news regarding the company's financial performance, including its Q4 2025 earnings which beat estimates and its 2026 outlook.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Texas Pacific misses Q4 2025 estimates, stock reacts
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation reported Q4 2025 earnings with EPS of $1.79 and revenue of $212 million, falling short of analyst expectations of $1.83 and $214 million respectively. Following the announcement, TPL's stock dropped 1.32% in premarket trading. Despite the miss, the company highlighted strategic investments in AI infrastructure and desalination technology, and increased its dividend by 12.5% to $0.60 per share.

feed.title: Intuit (INTU) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Intuit (INTU) is expected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ended January 2026. While the Zacks Consensus Estimate predicts earnings of $3.66 per share and revenues of $4.53 billion, the company's Zacks Earnings ESP of +1.38% combined with a Zacks Rank of #4 makes it difficult to definitively predict an earnings beat. Investors should consider the company's past performance and other factors beyond just earnings surprises.

feed.title: Turkey Says Greece-Chevron Activity Off Crete Unlawful
feed.summary: Turkey has declared the joint activity between Greece and Chevron off the coast of Crete as unlawful. This statement from Turkey highlights ongoing geopolitical tensions in the region regarding energy exploration rights. The declaration comes after Chevron's recent acquisition of Hess Corp.

feed.title: Analysts Estimate Coterra Energy (CTRA) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
feed.summary: Analysts expect Coterra Energy (CTRA) to report a year-over-year decline in earnings but higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. The company's upcoming earnings report on February 26 will reveal how actual results compare to the consensus estimate of $0.45 per share on $1.88 billion in revenue. The Zacks Earnings ESP model indicates a negative outlook for Coterra, suggesting that a beat is unlikely.

feed.title: Is Costco (COST) Stock Going to $1,200?
feed.summary: Costco's stock has seen significant growth over the past five years, but its future trajectory towards $1,200 is uncertain due to declining renewal rates and a high valuation. While its core business is robust with increasing warehouses and cardholders, a dip in global renewal rates, particularly among digitally signed members, and a premium valuation of 49 times this year's earnings could limit its short-term upside. Analysts project steady revenue and EPS growth, but the stock might trade sideways or decline slightly before reaching higher targets, making it potentially not the best immediate buy according to some analysts.

feed.title: AES (AES) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
feed.summary: AES (AES) is expected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. With a positive Earnings ESP of +0.54% and a Zacks Rank #2, the company is likely to beat the consensus EPS estimate. Investors are advised to consider other factors alongside these predictions when making investment decisions.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: Viatris (VTRS) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
feed.summary: Viatris (VTRS) is projected to report a decline in both earnings and revenues for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company's upcoming earnings report on February 26 could impact its stock price depending on whether the actual results beat or miss expectations. Despite the consensus EPS estimate being revised slightly higher, Viatris's Earnings ESP of 0% and a Zacks Rank of #3 make it difficult to conclusively predict an earnings beat.

feed.title: Sempra (SRE) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Can the Stock Move Higher?
feed.summary: Sempra (SRE) is anticipated to surpass earnings estimates for the quarter ending December 2025, with analysts revising their EPS expectations upwards. This positive outlook is supported by a strong Zacks Earnings ESP of +4.73% and a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold), indicating a high probability of an earnings beat. Despite a projected year-over-year decline in both earnings and revenue, the stock's potential movement depends on how actual results compare to these revised estimates, considering its history of beating EPS consensus three out of the last four quarters.

feed.title: Regency Centers (REG) Just Flashed Golden Cross Signal: Do You Buy?
feed.summary: Regency Centers (REG) has recently shown a "golden cross" signal, with its 50-day simple moving average crossing above its 200-day simple moving average, indicating a potential bullish breakout. The company also holds a #2 (Buy) on the Zacks Rank and has a positive earnings outlook, with 3 upward revisions in the past 60 days. Investors are advised to watch REG for potential gains due to these technical and fundamental factors.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: PSEG (PEG) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
feed.summary: PSEG (PEG) is projected to report a year-over-year decline in earnings for Q4 2025, despite higher expected revenues. The company's upcoming earnings report on February 26 will reveal how actual results compare to estimates, which could impact its stock price. With a Zacks Earnings ESP of 0% and a Zacks Rank #4, PSEG does not appear to be a strong candidate for an earnings beat.

feed.title: NetApp (NTAP) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
feed.summary: NetApp (NTAP) is expected to report an increase in year-over-year earnings and revenues for the quarter ended January 2026, with an anticipated EPS of $2.07 and revenues of $1.69 billion. However, the Zacks Earnings ESP for NTAP is -3.96% and the stock carries a Zacks Rank #4, making it difficult to definitively predict an earnings beat. Investors are advised to consider other factors alongside the Earnings ESP and Zacks Rank.

feed.title: Monster Beverage (MNST) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) is anticipated to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. The company's Earnings ESP of +8.31% and a Zacks Rank of #3 suggest a high probability of beating the consensus EPS estimate. Investors are advised to consider other factors beyond just earnings beats or misses, although a positive Earnings ESP and Zacks Rank do increase the odds of success.

feed.title: Analysts Estimate Smucker (SJM) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
feed.summary: Analysts are predicting a year-over-year decline in earnings for J.M. Smucker (SJM) in the quarter ended January 2026, despite higher projected revenues. The company is expected to report quarterly earnings of $2.25 per share, a 13.8% decrease, on revenues of $2.31 billion, up 5.7%. While the Most Accurate Estimate is slightly higher than the Zacks Consensus Estimate, Smucker's Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell) makes a conclusive prediction about an earnings beat difficult.

feed.title: Shore Bancshares, Inc. Announces Extension of Exchange Offer for its 6.25% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes Due 2035
feed.summary: Shore Bancshares, Inc. has announced an extension of its Exchange Offer for its 6.25% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes due 2035. The offer, initially set to expire on February 18, 2026, will now end on February 20, 2026, unless further extended. As of February 18, 2026, approximately 97% of the outstanding Old Notes had been tendered in the Exchange Offer.

feed.title: NVIDIA's 13F Bombshell: A New AI Power Trio Emerges
feed.summary: NVIDIA's latest 13F filing reveals its Q4 2025 investment activities, highlighting strategic moves within the AI and semiconductor sectors. The company made Intel and Synopsys its top holdings, indicating a deeper alignment for its x86 CPU ecosystem and chip design processes. NVIDIA also sold its stake in Applied Digital while maintaining positions in other neocloud companies, signaling a more focused portfolio and AI infrastructure priorities.

feed.title: Coca-Cola bottler disputes EEOC claim of sex discrimination over women-only trip
feed.summary: A Coca-Cola bottler, Coca-Cola Beverages Northeast Inc., is disputing a lawsuit filed by the EEOC alleging sex discrimination because the company hosted a women-only networking trip to Mohegan Sun in 2024. The EEOC claims excluding men constitutes a Title VII violation and a sex-based denial of equal compensation, as the women were paid for the event. The company's attorney argues the event fully complied with existing EEOC regulations and that the lawsuit was filed without a full investigation.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. (VST) is expected to report significant year-over-year earnings and revenue growth for the quarter ended December 2025, with an estimated EPS of $2.51 and revenues of $5.34 billion. However, despite the positive outlook, the company's Zacks Earnings ESP of -48.87% and a Zacks Rank #3 suggest it might not beat consensus EPS estimates. Investors are advised to consider other factors beyond just earnings expectations when evaluating the stock.

feed.title: Travelers, XL Specialty denied appeal in $25.5 million Cigna coverage dispute
feed.summary: Delaware's top court has denied an appeal from Travelers, XL Specialty, and two other insurers, upholding a ruling that a Justice Department demand for information should be treated as a covered insurance claim for Cigna. This decision leaves the insurers facing a $25.5 million coverage dispute regarding Cigna's expenses in responding to a federal investigation into potential False Claims Act violations. The case highlights the increasing complexity of trigger points for professional liability policies in healthcare, especially concerning government investigations.

feed.title: Analyst Reduces Northern Oil and Gas (NOG) Price Target to $24
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE: NOG) from $26 to $24, while maintaining an 'Underweight' rating. Mizuho also slightly reduced its price target from $30 to $29 but kept an 'Outperform' rating, citing wider natural gas differentials. Despite these revisions, the article suggests that other AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts See a 57.03% Upside in LiveRamp (RAMP): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
feed.summary: LiveRamp (RAMP) has seen its shares gain 0.4% recently, with Wall Street analysts setting an average short-term price target of $39.43, suggesting a potential 57% upside from its current $25.11. While price targets alone can be misleading, growing optimism among analysts regarding RAMP's earnings prospects, evidenced by upward EPS estimate revisions and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicates a legitimate reason to expect an upside in the stock. Investors are advised to treat price targets with skepticism but consider the positive earnings trend.

feed.title: Expeditors Rose 25% in the Last 6 Months. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) stock has risen 25% in the last six months due to stabilizing global freight conditions and improving shipment visibility. Despite this rally, the stock recently experienced a 7.2% intraday drop after Q3 institutional filings showed some large asset managers trimming their positions, though overall institutional ownership remains high. A valuation model suggests limited upside for EXPD by 2026, estimating a target price of $154.98, implying the stock is modestly overvalued under conservative assumptions.

feed.title: Why Is Billionaire Philippe Laffont Buying Sprouts Farmers Market Stock?
feed.summary: Billionaire hedge fund manager Philippe Laffont, known for his tech investments, has recently surprised the market by initiating a position in Sprouts Farmers Market (SFM), a specialty health-food retailer. This move, detailed in a recent 13F filing, comes as Sprouts Farmers Market exhibits solid financial growth, strategic operational strength, and an increasing integration of AI into its business model. Despite its stock being down 14% year-to-date, analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for SFM, projecting a significant upside potential.

feed.title: Dr Reddy's Acquires Progynova, Cyclo-Progynova Brands from Mercury Pharma
feed.summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd. has announced the acquisition of the trademarks for Progynova and Cyclo-Progynova, along with related assets, for the Indian market from Mercury Pharma Group Limited. This strategic move marks Dr. Reddy's entry into the hormone replacement therapy segment and strengthens its gynaecology portfolio in India. The brands, particularly Progynova, have a strong market presence with approximately ₹100 crore in sales, indicating a significant step for Dr. Reddy's in expanding its therapeutic offerings.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies Options Trading: A Deep Dive into Market Sentiment
feed.summary: Deep-pocketed investors are showing mixed sentiment towards Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ: AKAM), with a significant volume of options activity detected. Benzinga’s options scanner identified 9 extraordinary options activities, with 44% bullish and 33% bearish sentiment. The price targets considered by these investors range from $80.0 to $120.0, and one analyst from DA Davidson maintains a Buy rating with a target price of $125.0.

feed.title: Quanta Services's Options: A Look at What the Big Money is Thinking
feed.summary: Deep-pocketed investors have shown a mixed sentiment towards Quanta Services (NYSE: PWR), with a slight leaning towards bearishness, based on recent options activity. Benzinga's options scanner identified 16 unusual options activities for PWR, indicating significant market interest. Analysts have an average target price of $525.67 for Quanta Services, with recent ratings including an Overweight, a Buy, and a maintained Buy.

feed.title: Corporate Knights names Steel Dynamics global steel sustainability leader
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ: STLD) has been recognized by Corporate Knights as the global leader in the steelmaking industry and named one of the 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations for the second consecutive year. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to safety, innovation, and sustainability, based on Corporate Knights' evaluation of sustainable investments, revenues, and revenue momentum. Mark D. Millett, Co-Founder, Chairman, and CEO, emphasized that this honor reflects the dedication of their teams and drives their pursuit of high operational and financial performance.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Recognized by Corporate Knights as One of the Most Sustainable Corporations in the World
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. has been recognized by Corporate Knights as one of the 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations, leading the steelmaking industry globally. This marks the second consecutive year Steel Dynamics has received this honor, reflecting its commitment to sustainability, innovation, and operational excellence. The assessment by Corporate Knights considered companies with over $1 billion in revenue, evaluating them on sustainable investments, revenues, and revenue momentum.

feed.title: Beach City Coffee Launches Fair Trade Organic Beans in 350+ Kroger Stores
feed.summary: Women-owned coffee brand, Beach City Coffee, has expanded its reach by launching three Fair Trade organic blends in over 350 Kroger stores, including Ralphs, Fry’s, and King Soopers. The company emphasizes its commitment to sustainability through 100% compostable, PFAS-free packaging and sourcing practices that support farmers and community reinvestment. This expansion marks a significant growth milestone and highlights the brand's dedication to making a positive impact through everyday consumer choices.

feed.title: Keysight Introduces Infiniium XR8 Oscilloscopes to Accelerate High-Speed Digital Validation and Compliance
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has launched its new Infiniium XR8 Real-Time oscilloscopes, designed to enhance high-speed digital and compliance testing. These oscilloscopes feature a new hardware and software architecture with advanced ASIC and digital engine technology, aiming to reduce validation cycles from days to hours. The Infiniium XR8 offers improved signal integrity, faster response times, and a compact design, addressing the challenges of rapidly evolving interface standards and compressed development timelines.

feed.title: How Gartner will help accelerate and scale your AI strategy
feed.summary: Gartner's Application Innovation & Business Solutions Summit 2026 is designed to help enterprise leaders overcome common hurdles in AI strategy implementation, such as cultural change, skills gaps, governance, and architectural issues. The summit offers practical insights and interactive sessions to assist in turning AI visions into reality, focusing on GenAI adoption, application modernization, and cost optimization. Attendees can expect actionable strategies, peer-led discussions, and expert guidance to accelerate and scale their AI initiatives.

feed.title: Germany Considers Additional F-35 Purchase from Lockheed Martin (LMT)
feed.summary: Germany is reportedly considering purchasing over 35 additional F-35 fighter jets from Lockheed Martin, despite official denials, due to challenges with its joint fighter program with France. While Lockheed Martin, a dominant player in aerospace and defense, shows strong revenue growth, it faces declining margins and a high valuation. Investors should be aware of the company's significant leverage and potential overvaluation.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of uniQure N.V. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE) investors who purchased securities between September 24, 2025, and October 31, 2025. The lawsuit stems from a significant drop in uniQure's stock price after the company announced on November 3, 2025, that the FDA no longer agreed that data from its Phase I/II studies for AMT-130 would be sufficient for a Biologics License Application submission, a "key shift" from prior communications. Investors have until April 13, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Remitly Global (NASDAQ:RELY) Shares Gap Up Following Better-Than-Expected Earnings
feed.summary: Remitly Global (NASDAQ:RELY) shares gapped up after reporting better-than-expected Q4 earnings, with EPS of $0.19 against an estimated $0.02 and revenue of $442.2 million, a 25.7% year-over-year increase. The company also provided strong FY2026 and Q1 revenue guidance, which has positively influenced analyst sentiment, though insider selling and mixed analyst ratings indicate some lingering caution.

feed.title: Oceaneering International (NYSE:OII) Sets New 1-Year High on Strong Earnings
feed.summary: Oceaneering International (NYSE:OII) reached a new 52-week high after reporting better-than-expected Q-quarter EPS of $0.45, surpassing the consensus of $0.44. Despite a revenue decline year-over-year, the company showcased strong financial metrics, including a net margin of 8.21% and a 22.94% return on equity. Analyst ratings are a consensus "Hold" with a $25 average target, with some firms recently adjusting price objectives upward.

feed.title: Oceaneering International stock hits 52-week high at $34.64
feed.summary: Oceaneering International Inc. (OII) stock reached a 52-week high of $34.67, reflecting strong performance with a 40.83% increase over the last year. The company boasts a Piotroski Score of 9, a P/E ratio of 14.45, and a low PEG ratio of 0.19, indicating potential value. Recent leadership changes include Michael W. Sumruld appointed as CFO and Roger Jenkins joining the Board of Directors.
